headline_seed: France bans Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after ‘unspeakable’ flotilla detainee taunts - AP News
draft_text: France banned Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir from its territory Saturday. Associated Press reports French FM Barrot cited Ben-Gvir's conduct toward ~430 detained flotilla activists, including video of him waving a flag over kneeling detainees.
